description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown top and reddish-brown body, featuring three drawers on the right side and a single cabinet door on the left. The drawers and cabinet door are accented with a lighter beige trim and round knobs, providing a contrasting visual detail. The drawers are partially open, revealing their boxy interiors, while the cabinet door is also ajar, suggesting storage space inside. The desk has a solid, sturdy appearance with a flat, spacious surface suitable for work or study. The wood grain texture is visible on the body, adding a touch of realism and warmth. The overall design is functional and practical, suitable for both home and office environments.
description: A sturdy wooden desk with a dark top, three right-side drawers, and a left cabinet door, all accented with beige trim and knobs. The desk has a warm, reddish-brown body and a spacious, flat work surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers on the right, a cabinet door on the left, both partially open, and the full desk surface.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the open bottom drawer, and the open cabinet door.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panels of the desk with no visible drawers or doors.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the open cabinet door and the desk's solid side panel.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features three drawers on the right and a cabinet door on the left, both accessible from the front, with the flat top serving as the primary work surface.
